body_txt: A fictional character or creature that is just a head (as opposed to a Waddling Head or someone who's recently lost their head ) that can also fly, hover, or just get around under its own power. Comes in a few artistic styles: Sometimes these Flying Faces are nice, sometimes noisy Cloudcuckoolanders , often intelligent , and sometimes they don't talk. Not to be confused with Floating Head Syndrome . See Also: Cephalothorax , Oracular Head , and Oculothorax .
